query: SELECT 'AnaClara' as paciente, id, tipoUltrassom, JSON_KEYS(dados) as campos, dados FROM ultrassons WHERE gestanteId = 330018 AND tipoUltrassom = 'ultrassom_seguimento' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1;
